articles.title: March Madness: Here's one thing you need to know about each of the 16 teams remaining in men's field
articles.original_title: March Madness: Here's one thing you need to know about each of the 16 teams remaining in men's field
articles.summary: Florida isn’t around to defend its title anymore, but all the other top seeds in this year's NCAA Tournament are still around.  In the first week of the NCAA Tournament, games were decided by an average of 15.3 points.  The only NCAA Tournaments with higher average victory margin since then came in 1993 (16.1) and 2024 (15.4).
